summary: Iter-33: validated 4 fixes — admin-tunable per-IP rate limit, PatientResults field-name mapping, AdminDashboard widened search, SiteCopyAdminPanel Hide/Custom keys. Backend pytest 7 pass / 2 skipped (the 2 skips are POST /api/requests tests blocked by strict Turnstile from iter71 — server-side cannot mint a valid token; functionality is verified by code review + frontend e2e). Admin endpoints GET/PUT /admin/intake-rate-limit correctly accept and persist max_per_ip_per_hour. Site-copy: PUT empty value persists '', public /api/site-copy returns the empty string, DELETE removes the row. Frontend Site copy panel: Hide on site button, Reset, Custom keys + Delete all confirmed end-to-end with public-API readback. SettingsPanel renders the new 'Max submissions per IP per hour' input (testid=rate-limit-ip-input, default 8) with helper copy. AdminDashboard 'All providers' search 'psychologist' narrows 125→47 (only 7 PsyD/PhD shown on first page) — credentialLabel match works; 'aetna' narrows to 47, 'Boise'/'telehealth' also narrow visible totals. Rate-limit cap reset to {1, 60min, 8/IP/hr} after testing.

minor.issue: Strict Turnstile (iter71) prevents server-side smoke tests from POSTing. /api/requests rate-limit cap=N → (N+1)th=429 path could not be e2e verified by pytest. The wiring (read max_per_ip_per_hour from app_config) is validated by code review of /app/backend/routes/patients.py:114-119. Pre-existing test_iteration69_priorities_botdef.py::test_ip_rate_limit_9th_is_429 is also broken by the same root cause.

action_items: Consider adding a backend test-mode shortcut (e.g. TURNSTILE_TEST_BYPASS env) so pytest can exercise /api/requests end-to-end. Today server-side tests can't reach that endpoint, which forced 2 skips here and is the root cause of the iter69 IP-rate-limit test now failing.

OPTIONAL: PatientResults field rendering wasn't e2e-tested (same Turnstile blocker). Main agent can self-verify by submitting the intake via the live frontend with the patient demo email and visiting /results/{id} — the YourReferralPanel field name mapping (location_zip, modality_preference, insurance_name, budget, prior_therapy, age_group fallbacks) is correct in source per review_request.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/admin.py:1488-1565 — max_per_ip_per_hour validation is correct (1..10000), defaults applied when omitted (backwards compat), payload errors return 400. Good.
/app/backend/routes/patients.py:114-119 — reads ip_cap from app_config.intake_rate_limit.max_per_ip_per_hour with fallback 8; condition `ip_cap > 0 and ip_recent >= ip_cap` is correct.

/app/backend/routes/site_copy.py — PUT accepts empty string (Field max_length=20000, no min on value); public GET correctly returns the empty string in the {key: value} map (verified via fetch). DELETE returns {deleted: count}.
Frontend SiteCopyAdminPanel: testids `copy-hide-{key}` present; Hide button + Reset + Add custom key + Delete custom key all wired and confirmed via /api/site-copy readback within the same session.
Frontend SettingsPanel: rate-limit-ip-input testid present, default 8, helper text explains the network cap clearly.

Frontend AdminDashboard search: 'psychologist' surfaces PsyD/PhD therapists (credentialLabel humanization is wired); 'aetna' narrows to 47 of 125 — search now spans credentials, specialties, insurance, addresses, languages as designed.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration33_admin_ratelimit_sitecopy.py (new, 9 tests, 2 marked skip with documented reason)

success_rate.backend: 100% of runnable (7/7 pass, 2 skipped due to Turnstile)

test_credentials: admin master pwd: admin123! (Master password tab on /admin)
seed_data_creation: Created+cleaned: TEST_iter33_hide_key (deleted), test.iter33.custom.key (deleted via UI). Rate-limit cap toggled 8→3→8 (reset). Verified final state: GET /api/admin/intake-rate-limit = {1, 60min, 8/IP/hr}. landing.faq.subhead override created+reset within the test (no residue).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: `cd /app/backend && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://care-matcher-1.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest tests/test_iteration33_admin_ratelimit_sitecopy.py -v`. Two tests are intentionally skipped — they need a Turnstile bypass that doesn't exist server-side. Frontend testids verified: rate-limit-ip-input, copy-hide-{key}, copy-search, more-tab-site_copy, more-tab-settings, tab-all_therapists, admin-search-input. The 'Showing 47 of 125' counter on All providers reliably indicates filter narrowing even when first page shows 20 rows (page size).
rca of the issue: Pre-existing bug: test_iteration69_priorities_botdef.py::test_ip_rate_limit_9th_is_429 fails post iter71 because Turnstile is now strictly enforced — server-side tests can't acquire a valid token, so /api/requests POST returns 400 'Missing security verification token' before the rate-limit code path is reached. Reproduction: cd /app/backend && pytest tests/test_iteration69_priorities_botdef.py -v. Mitigation: introduce TURNSTILE_TEST_BYPASS=1 env (gated behind APP_ENV != 'production') in turnstile_service.verify_token, OR keep it out and rely on frontend Playwright + code review for that path. The new admin tests (test_iteration33_admin_ratelimit_sitecopy.py) explicitly skip those two cases with a documented reason.
